reviews.comment:
Quise cambiar los puntos serviclub en el full y no me los canjearon. No me dieron explicación. Son ypf deben canjearlos.

(Translated by Google)
I tried to redeem my Serviclub points in the full program, but they wouldn't redeem them. They didn't give me an explanation. YPF should redeem them.
